title: Hidden Seele logos on Liliths stigma nails
display_title: Hidden Seele logos on Liliths stigma nails
wikitext:
[]: "Hidden" Seele logos on Lilith's stigma nails?             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Jul 06, 2010 11:34 pm

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Jul 06, 2010 11:36 pm I say yes. But a Blu-ray of EoE would be awesome. The nails having Seele logos actually make sense in the context (well, sorta) of Lilith's mask in 1.11 at least...

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Wed Jul 07, 2010 12:09 am You've really good eyes to notice it from that prospective! Anyway I think that you're right, even in the Groundwork (volume 2) at page 111 there's an arrow indicating the nail and there's a text (that I can't read) but more importantly under the text there's a drawing of the Seele logo (I suppose that in the text it mentions that there's that logo on the nail).

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Jul 07, 2010 2:12 pm Just when you thought the nerds of this site had inspected every single detail there is to see in every single frame of Evangelion, NAveryW happens.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jul 07, 2010 2:20 pm I'm ashamed that I didn't notice this years ago.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Wed Jul 07, 2010 8:38 pm Reichu wrote: I'm ashamed that I didn't notice this years ago.

[]:             Quote Post by Smugleaf » Thu Jul 08, 2010 12:16 am Reichu wrote: I'm ashamed that I didn't notice this years ago.

[]:             Quote Post by Halicat » Tue Jul 13, 2010 1:12 am To be fair I wouldn't have noticed that in a million years and I've watched the movie too many times to count, not easy to spot. I'd say yes for sure though, they look like exactly like mini emblems of Lilith's mask.

[]:             Quote Post by Tails_night » Wed Jul 14, 2010 8:04 pm I don't think I would have cought that, but then again I've only seen 1.0 a few times. But also it's kinda of expected, seeing as nerv and seele basically slap their logo on everything related or touched by them. case in point, the bones and ribs of theThird Angel.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Jul 14, 2010 8:16 pm Tails_night wrote: I don't think I would have cought that, but then again I've only seen 1.0 a few times. But also it's kinda of expected, seeing as nerv and seele basically slap their logo on everything related or touched by them. case in point, the bones and ribs of theThird Angel.

[]:             Quote Post by Tails_night » Wed Jul 14, 2010 10:12 pm Oh >.> well now I feel really slow. I thought those were images from the rebuild since this is the original, I'm really suprised I never cought it. I think I've watched the original NGE so many times I can literally retell episodes night after night on camping trips as bonfire stories. Thats a nice little discovery. Now I'm half tempted to start watching episode by episode on a projector to see if there isn't other little things like that everywhere. I never would have thought they put that much detail into things.

[]:             Quote Post by Nightquest » Sun Jul 25, 2010 4:38 pm Hidden Seele logo on Lilith... again? From 2.22: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer137 » Sun Jul 25, 2010 4:43 pm This is the eva-ological find of the century, granted it's only been 10 years though. We have our own archeological parody now.
